programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S3E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic, boundary-pushing adventures. Watch GoPro athlete Kilian Bron, trail innovator, team up with big-mountain skier Victor Broquedis, powder champion, in Peru as they summit Cerro Blanco, the world-record 3,860-foot dune, and ride unforgettable downhill mountain bike and ski runs. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill, speed, and adrenaline.

programme.title: S3E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you heart-pounding downhill action from the Mountain of Hell in Les Alpes, France. Watch GoPro athlete Antoni Villoni, downhill master, as he navigates crashes, weaves through expert trails, and powers down 7,800 vertical feet of snow-capped peaks, dusty singletracks, and technical terrain. Hundreds of riders take on this epic race, where only speed, skill, and courage decide who reaches the finish line first. The rules are simple: first one to cross the line wins...

programme.title: Keoma The Avenger 1976

With its haunting atmosphere, gritty violence, and powerful performances, this Spaghetti Western classic blends myth and vengeance into an unforgettable tale.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.desc: Guadalajara’s heritage runs deep. On the DIRT crew’s latest adventure, they explored the region’s rich history from volcanic highlands to secret surf coves. Chefs Xrysw Ruelas and Óscar Segundo sent Josh and co. to load up on locally grown coffee, spearfish between catching waves, and follow freshly harvested agave on its journey to becoming tequila. After learning the ropes of Mexico’s national sport, Charreria, and hitting up a Lucha Libre match, all the local flavors came together in a feast backed by thousands of years of tradition. There really is something special in the soil here.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc:
"In this episode of Huckberry Homes, we traveled down to Jacksonville, Florida to meet up with longtime friend, GORUCK Co-founder, and former Special Forces Green Beret Jason McCarthy. When he’s not rucking to and from the GORUCK HQ, you can find him and his friends putting on grueling garage workouts that are the talk of the neighborhood.
Huckberry and GORUCK go way back, we’ve shared plenty of good times, GORUCK Challenges, and (more than) a few beers along the way. Their military-grade lineup is designed to be taken to hell and back in the field. So whether you’re traveling the world or “embracing the suck” with a 30 LB plate in your rucksack, you can be sure your gear’s up to the challenge."

programme.title: Blue World Ep502: Muck Diving in Florida + Iceland…The World's Clearest Water
programme.desc: Host Jonathan Bird travels to Iceland to investigate a giant crack in the ground filled with frigid runoff from melting glaciers. It’s rumored to be the clearest water in the world. Next, he heads to sunny Florida, not to dive a coral reef or a spectacular shipwreck, but to dive in shallow, murky water under a busy bridge. This secret spot is home to some of the ocean’s most remarkable, and strange, creatures.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: In the Season 2 premiere of Surviving Mann you'll meet The Black Team and The Blue Team—12 tough-as-nails contestants who will take on everything Don could throw at them even after seeing Season 1! Co-host Sheriff Mark Lamb jumps in to bring advanced law enforcement training tactics & strategies to the evolution line-up.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The best of the best are back to compete, and Don’s serving up a heaping plate of his signature 10-part PRT. A bear crawl down a mountain, log running and two-point planks are just some of Don’s welcome gauntlet. And the cherry on top—a 5k desert run. But the contestants only have themselves to blame. Because when you’re already amongst the elite, you have to do whatever it takes to find the one who stands above the rest.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The CIA has called again, and Don has answered the call on behalf of the A-team. A team of special operatives are needed for a highly classified peace mission that could turn deadly at a moment's notice. To spearhead their mission training efforts, the team hits the range with some state-of-the-art SIRT pistols. Then, the gloves are off and the team gets their first course of fire for the season. After the fun course of fire, the team switches gears to knife throwing and fire building, with the help of Top Knives. It’s safe to say, these All-stars aren’t waiting a second.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: It’s a new day, which means Don takes the contestants' training to new heights..literally. But first, the All-Stars are split into teams for a searching mission, using Offgrid’s Faraday bags. Later, they’re introduced to the new ropes course, “The Odyssey”, to test their mental and physical fortitude, as well as their endurance, using a climbing wall. See who rises to the occasion and who suffers from "paralysis by over analysis” in this episode.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: The day starts off with some unique courses of fire that get the All Stars’ blood pumping. With the help of Rogue Ops, New Frontier Armory and Griffin Armament, the teams are outfitted with the most premiere artillery in the industry. Then, the All Stars get out of the heat and head indoors to do some CQC training with Surviving Mann alum, Randy Couture. If anyone thought it would be a break.. they were surely mistaken.

programme.title: S1E3 Two Roads
programme.desc: “Two Roads” is an original GoPro series that follows nine athletes and one coach who have committed themselves to the relentless pursuit of greatness. Each episode dives deep into an athlete’s unique journey, revealing the life-changing moments that shaped the path they walk today. This episode features Paul Rabil, legendary professional lacrosse player and co-founder of the Premier Lacrosse League, celebrated as one of the greatest in the sport’s history. Also featured is Britney Henry, a standout track and field athlete from the University of Oregon who captured the Pac-10 Conference title in the hammer throw. Rounding out the episode is Meagan Martin, trailblazing competitor as the first female rookie to complete the American Ninja Warrior course and the first-ever Women’s Champion of the series.

programme.title: S2E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic rides around the world. Watch Olympic gold medalist Conor Fields, BMX champion, compete at the highest level, then join GoPro athletes Sam Pilgrim, urban downhill master, Geoff Gulevich, trail expert, and Sam Reynolds, street shredder, as they explore the stunning landscapes and dramatic terrain of Cappadocia, Turkey. Adventure, speed, and skill collide in every breathtaking moment.

programme.title: S2E3 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you to the world’s most extreme mountain biking adventures. Watch Geoff Gulevich, trail master, tackle some of the gnarliest chutes in Williams Lake, BC, dropping in with local legend Cory Brunelle, downhill expert. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S3E1 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike takes you on epic, boundary-pushing adventures. Watch GoPro athlete Kilian Bron, trail innovator, team up with big-mountain skier Victor Broquedis, powder champion, in Peru as they summit Cerro Blanco, the world-record 3,860-foot dune, and ride unforgettable downhill mountain bike and ski runs. Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill, speed, and adrenaline.

programme.title: S3E2 Bike
programme.desc: GoPro Bike brings you heart-pounding downhill action from the Mountain of Hell in Les Alpes, France. Watch GoPro athlete Antoni Villoni, downhill master, as he navigates crashes, weaves through expert trails, and powers down 7,800 vertical feet of snow-capped peaks, dusty singletracks, and technical terrain. Hundreds of riders take on this epic race, where only speed, skill, and courage decide who reaches the finish line first. The rules are simple: first one to cross the line wins...

programme.title: Land Of Teranga | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 1

Their first stop is N'Gor Island, where they ride the wave seen in the opening sequence of "Endless Summer." On the island, they learn about Teranga, the Senegalese quality of hospitality, sharing, and welcomeness. They also meet up with Marta Imarisio, who has helped inspire the country's women and girls to get into surfing.
